The reason for this is that I have not released a new version so far and the package manager pulls the latest release not the most recent commit. To run the latest "developer" version you can add the package other than described in the [documentation](https://hobezwe.github.io/SphericalScattering.jl/dev/#Installation) as 'dev SphericalScattering' instead of 'add SphericalScattering'. Then all new features should be available. Alternatively, I could just release a new version. I just thought that I better do so at the end of the review. Basically, I would be surprised to see errors occur since, e.g., all of the [Application Examples](https://hobezwe.github.io/SphericalScattering.jl/dev/application/#Application-Examples) are actually executed on GitHub when creating the Documentation. That is, the results in the documentation are obtained by actually running the code. @HoBeZwe Could you say something here about some of the commented-out test code such as https://github.com/HoBeZwe/SphericalScattering.jl/blob/bebea6b63d8b9eef1f7c108e51d4cb6d06c57559/test/sphericalModes.jl#L39? Since the higher-order modes were not stabilized (as pointed out in the documentation) we were a bit lazy in the tests for this excitation. So a good reason to be skeptical here. To properly fix this, we decided to directly remove the limitation and then upgrade the tests. The latter are now more thorough (especially, the [TE scattering case](https://github.com/HoBeZwe/SphericalScattering.jl/blob/47393e9508b0deba0aa8db37d97700c26db0396f/test/sphericalModes.jl#L46) and the [TM scattering case](https://github.com/HoBeZwe/SphericalScattering.jl/blob/47393e9508b0deba0aa8db37d97700c26db0396f/test/sphericalModes.jl#L146)). Concerning, tests like [this](https://github.com/HoBeZwe/SphericalScattering.jl/blob/47393e9508b0deba0aa8db37d97700c26db0396f/test/sphericalModes.jl#L23) we added comments to clearly state the origin of the numerical values and the limited usefulness of the tests.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/openjournals/joss-reviews/issues/comments/1741531202/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
